title: Optimization Plus
description: Up-to-date optimization modpack to increase your performance many times over.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54c37db113f8993d7cf1fbbf85de15cb406dc34.jpeg)

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/248a6a0ffd6840705ed9179c974f969161be9091.png)](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/folox_)

This modern modpack was created so that people with both strong and weak devices could enjoy Minecraft on a large render or with shaders that were strong before. This pack optimizes all aspects of the game, such as Players, Entities, Rendering, Sky, Light, Clouds, etc.

ㅤ

ㅤ
## 🐬 instalation
### ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ  Modrinth App
> 1. Press **+**
> 2. Click *"From File"* and select the downloaded modpack.
> 3. Once downloaded, click on *"Play"*
### ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ Launchers without support importing from other launchers
> 1. Download and install latest version [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) or [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/client/).
> 2. In the launcher in installation select the downloaded version with Fabric.
> 3. You need to convert the file from _.mrpack_ to _.zip_ with the [converter](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/)
> 4. Move the mods folder from the archive to the _.minecraft_ folder

## 💙 How can I support this project?
1. Tell your friends  who play and want to improve the performance of Minecraft about this mod pack.
2. You can donate to me on the [**DonationAlerts**](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/folox_)
